channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.20 (Build 20260307)
item.description:
What's New

feat(XKeyIM): enable Vietnamese toggle menu & show 'E' icon when XKeyIM active

  • Uncomment Vietnamese toggle menu item in XKeyIMController.menu()
  • Fix AppDelegate.handleInputSourceChange(): force isVietnameseEnabled=false

when XKeyIM is active so XKey main app shows 'E' (engine off)

  • XKeyIM handles Vietnamese typing independently via its own engine

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
